response.step_by_step_log: 1. Performed OCR on video to identify songs: 'さよなら人魚' and 'サンドリヨン'. 2. Searched for both songs using '[Song Title] lyrics'. 3. For 'Sayonara Ningyo', no definitive original artist or lyrics found. 4. For 'Cendrillon', identified as a well-known Vocaloid song by Dios/SignalP and provided known lyrics.
response.global_summary: A virtual concert performance by Himemori Luna and Akai Haato, featuring two songs, 'Sayonara Ningyo' and 'Cendrillon'.

scenes.description: Himemori Luna and Akai Haato performing 'Sayonara Ningyo' on stage.
Himemori Luna and Akai Haato performing 'Cendrillon' on stage with a clock background.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: サンドリヨン、午前12時\n鐘が鳴るまで踊って\n...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Cinderella, I want to dance with you until the clock strikes twelve\nWith a false smile, I'll go back to the ruins\n...
